title: Microsoft Purview DSPM lab configuration
description: Declarative scope and cadence for the Wave 3a Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) signal-source verifier (scripts/Test-DSPMPosture.ps1) and Content Explorer exporter (scripts/Export-ContentExplorerData.ps1). DSPM itself is an aggregator surfaced by Microsoft in the Purview portal; this file declares the signal sources the lab feeds it and the cadence the lab harvests Content Explorer evidence on. References: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/dspm-get-started, docs/adr/0021-dspm-content-explorer-cadence.md.

scope.description: Inputs the exporter iterates. Per ADR 0021 Decision 3, each run iterates the union of published labels and custom SITs across the listed workloads.

labels.description: Sensitivity labels source. Default source is data-plane/information-protection/labels.yaml (Wave 1).

sits.description: Sensitive Information Types source. Default source is data-plane/classifications/classifications.yaml (lab-authored custom SITs only). The Microsoft reference catalog data-plane/classifications/sit-catalog.yaml is intentionally NOT enumerated here per the v2 §5.4 drift closure (issue #366) -- it would push the weekly Get-ContentExplorerData run plan above the ~25-entry ceiling ADR 0021 'Harder' section warns about. The catalog file remains a GUID lookup for IP / DLP per ADR 0016 §4; opt-in re-introduction of selected built-in SITs is tracked separately.

export.description: Cadence, output, and throttling knobs grounded in ADR 0021 decisions 1, 5, and 6.

cadence.description: Primary cadence label. The actual schedule lives in the GitHub Actions workflow that calls Export-ContentExplorerData.ps1; this field is a human-readable contract anchor. ADR 0021 Decision 1 selects 'weekly'.

artifactDir.description: Repo-relative directory the exporter writes timestamped subfolders into. ADR 0021 Decision 5 selects 'verify-dspm-export-output'. Must be gitignored.

retentionDays.description: GitHub Actions artifact retention in days. ADR 0021 Decision 5 aligns this to the 90-day audit retention horizon.

throttleSeconds.description: Sleep between consecutive Get-ContentExplorerData calls. ADR 0021 Decision 6 selects 1 second.

maxRetries.description: Maximum retries on transient HTTP 429 from Get-ContentExplorerData. ADR 0021 Decision 6 selects 3.

sources.description: Repo-relative paths to the upstream desired-state YAMLs this scope source pulls from.

oneOf.description: Include every entry the upstream YAMLs produce.

Opt-in scoping: include only the named entries (by display name for labels, or by name / immutable identifier for SITs). Use this shape to add selected Microsoft built-in SITs from data-plane/classifications/sit-catalog.yaml to DSPM scope once the lab actively classifies content against them, without re-enumerating the full 327-entry catalog. The Test-DSPMPosture.ps1 ceiling guard rail (issue #610) emits Warn above 25 total entries (labels + SITs) and Fail above 100; thresholds are pinned to ADR 0021 'Harder' section.
